text: A street scene in a city, likely Mumbai, featuring a yellow and blue Ambassador taxi driving on the left side of the road. The background shows a multi-story building with balconies, dense foliage, and a large tree. A blue and white metal fence runs along the sidewalk, separating the road from the building.
